title: F-COL1 Resolution Assessment: Mediocrity-Selection Degenerative Spiral
question: Can the swarm model and avoid the mediocrity-selection degenerative spiral?

test_1_diversity.verdict: Imitation dynamics real. UCB1 rich-get-richer confirmed.

test_2_mismatch_threshold.verdict: Dual-threshold model replaces single-threshold. Spiral inactive — diversity crossed, quality not. UCB1 self-evaluation Goodhart-contaminated.

test_3_dispatch_vs_equal.verdict: No significant UCB1 advantage. Concentration negatively correlated with quality.

goodhart_cascade.finding: Self-referential evaluation produces false meritocratic signal. UCB1 rho=+0.693 vs external rho=-0.151. Three proxy chains all diverge.
goodhart_cascade.implication: Cannot trust UCB1 to evaluate UCB1 allocation. Need external metrics.

what_was_answered: Mediocrity-selection spiral EXISTS as structural mechanism (9 propositions, 4 tested empirically)
Dual-threshold model identified: quality (5x mismatch) AND diversity (30% top-3 share)
Current state: diversity threshold CROSSED (34.6%), quality threshold NOT crossed (meta at median)
UCB1 defense mechanism is Goodhart-contaminated — cannot self-diagnose
Expert dispatch ≈ equal allocation on quality metrics (no significant difference)
what_remains_open: Intervention test: does capping top-3 share <30% arrest diversity decline?
External quality metrics: needed to replace Goodhart-contaminated Sharpe
Activation test: what happens when quality threshold IS crossed? (requires deliberate or natural conditions)
Scale: results at n=54 lanes/12 domains; behavior at n>200 unknown

P1_diversity_cap.action: Add diversity_cap parameter to dispatch_optimizer.py: cap top-3 domain share at 30%
P1_diversity_cap.mechanism: If top-3 share > 0.30, redistribute excess probability to underrepresented domains
P1_diversity_cap.test: Top-3 share drops below 30%; effective diversity increases; mean Sharpe unchanged (CI includes 0)

P2_external_quality.action: Replace self-rated Sharpe with merge rate as primary quality signal in UCB1
P2_external_quality.mechanism: merge_rate = merged_lanes / total_lanes per domain. External to assignment process.
P2_external_quality.test: UCB1 rankings converge with external rankings at rho > 0.3

P3_monitoring.action: Add dual-threshold monitoring to orient.py: surface DUE when top-3 > 30% OR any domain mismatch > 5x

successor_work: F-COL1 monitoring phase (S542+). Implement P1 diversity cap. Track whether spiral activates if conditions change. Consider F-COL2 for external quality metrics integration.
